data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail of exports, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail, yet there is no evidence of its implementation or validation in the current saga run. This indicates a clear gap in coverage for the requirement, as no concrete data or endpoints were referenced to support the existence of such an audit trail.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail for exports.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
